title: Write scripts/seed-supabase.ts skeleton
description:
## Objective
Create the seeder entry point with local-URL guard, service-key resolution, clean-DB precondition, and smoke-test insert into tags.

## Spec Reference
.devmeta/projects/2026-05-21-seeder-scaffold/2026-05-21-seeder-scaffold-spec.md — Section: Step 2

## Scope
**Files:** scripts/seed-supabase.ts — NEW

## Implementation
1. Import createClient from @supabase/supabase-js, execa from execa
2. resolveLocalSupabase() that prefers SUPABASE_URL + SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY env vars, falls back to parsing npx supabase status -o json (use the field names confirmed in the previous task)
3. main() flow: resolve → host check (must be 127.0.0.1 or localhost — error otherwise) → build supabase client with service-role key → clean-DB precondition (count companies; error if any rows) → smoke-test insert one row into tags (name='__seed_smoke_test__', color='#000000') → log OK
4. Top-level catch that logs the error and exits non-zero
5. Make sure imports / TypeScript syntax type-check cleanly

## Tests
Run: npx tsc --noEmit scripts/seed-supabase.ts (or npm run typecheck if the script is included)
Run: npm run typecheck
Do NOT close until typecheck passes.
acceptance_criteria: scripts/seed-supabase.ts exists; npm run typecheck passes
